title: +
content:
+
+## Multilayer Architecture
+
+RLOS is built as a **modular stack** comprising nine major layers. Each layer handles a distinct linguistic aspect while exchanging information with others. The stack begins with iconographic and phonological processing and culminates in a user‑facing interface:
+
+| Layer | Function |
+| --- | --- |
+| **Iconographic** | Handles emoji, hieroglyphs, typography and other visual symbols【33635101037775†L259-L266】【33635101037775†L263-L272】. |
+| **Phonological** | Analyses sound patterns – rhythm, stress, intonation and prosody【33635101037775†L91-L110】. |
+| **Morphological** | Segments morphemes, manages vocabulary and supports rich inflectional systems; the module also treats emoji and stickers as lexical items【33635101037775†L112-L128】. |
+| **Syntactic** | Builds constituency and dependency structures and connects grammar to rhetorical relations【33635101037775†L129-L144】. |
+| **Semantic** | Maps syntactic structures to meaning representations (named entities, sentiment, intent)【33635101037775†L144-L156】. |
